description.zh-Hans: 向图像中注入噪波/颗粒效果：胶片颗粒、灰尘划痕、扫描线、彩色噪波和雪花。完全可平铺。
description.en: Injects noise/grain effects into an image: film grain, dust, scanlines, color noise, and static. Fully tileable.

triggers.zh-Hans: 噪波注入, 噪点, 胶片颗粒, 雪花, 像素抖动, 灰尘划痕
triggers.en: noise injection, noise, film grain, snow, pixel jitter, dust scratches

exampleUsage.zh-Hans: 为图像添加胶片颗粒噪点以模拟复古效果。
exampleUsage.en: Add film grain noise to an image for a retro effect.
